items.claim: Ismael Bonfim tends to melt and quit when facing resistance in competitive fights.
items.quote: I think when it comes down to a competitive fight, when he meets resistance, he [ __ ] melts, bro.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim is a good striker.
items.quote: I don't think Ismael Bonfim is awful at fighting. I think he's a good striker

items.claim: Axel Sola is bigger and fights as a southpaw.
Santiago Ponzinibio has a record of three wins and six losses in the 2020s.
items.quote: In the 2020s, he is a three- win, six loss fighter.

items.claim: Sam Patterson is 6'3" with a 78-inch reach and a record of 14-3.
items.quote: Sam Patterson is 30. He's got a 78 inch reach. He's 14 and three. Come on, dude. 6'3.
